Group Key: (CASE WHEN ((ci ~~* '%dell%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%hp %'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%elitebook%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%thinkpad%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%latitude%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%optiplex%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%laptop%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%desktop%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%server%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%printer%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%monitor%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%keyboard%'::text)) THEN 'Hardware (belongs in Assets)'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%software%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%system%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%aws%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%cloud%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%vpn%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%virtual private%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%management system%'::text)) THEN 'Software/Services (belongs in Services)'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%travel%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%suitcase%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%luggage%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%bag%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%carry%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%bus%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%jet%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%boeing%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%airline%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%flight%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%hotel%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%gps%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%garmin%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%tumi%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%samsonite%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%suv%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%vehicle%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%corporate%'::text)) THEN 'Genuine Travel Item'::text ELSE 'Ambiguous'::text END)
